posts.title: The Language of Shadows
posts.excerpt: How chiaroscuro lighting became the emotional backbone of "The Last Frame" and why darkness tells more than light.

posts.title: Building a World from Memory
posts.excerpt: Production designer Maria Santos reveals how the team recreated 1970s New York on a soundstage in Budapest.

posts.title: A Conversation with Sarah Mitchell
posts.excerpt: Editor Sarah Mitchell discusses the rhythm of cuts, the art of restraint, and finding the heartbeat of a film in the editing room.

posts.title: The Silence Between Notes
posts.excerpt: Why the most powerful moments in cinema are often the ones without dialogue — exploring sound design as emotional architecture.

posts.title: Announcing "The Infinite Hour"
posts.excerpt: My next project explores time, memory, and the spaces between seconds. Production begins this fall.

posts.title: The Color of Memory
posts.excerpt: Colorist Daniel Zimmerman walks us through the grading process, creating a palette that feels like faded photographs.
